programme.title: South Park: The Pandemic Special

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita

programme.title: The Closer: Dial 'M' for Provenza
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Provenza goes undercover to look into a murder for hire.

programme.title: Major Crimes: N.S.F.W.
programme.desc: The murder of a Sex Crimes detective leads Major Crimes into the world of barely legal porn, where they find rampant drug use and questionable ethics. Meanwhile, Rusty's biological mother, Sharon Beck returns with some surprising news.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Foreign Affairs
programme.desc: After an ISIS-inspired attack against a member of the US Armed Services, the FBI asks for Captain Raydor's help in finding a terrorist as Major Crimes joins the Bureau in a race against the clock before the terrorist can strike again.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Flynn looks into purchasing a new home and seeks input from Provenza and Buzz, an unexpected turn of events leads to a new investigation for Major Crimes. Meanwhile, Buzz continues to look into the circumstances surrounding his father's murder.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Plain View
programme.desc: Jane and the squad team up with another detective who believes they are both hunting for the same killer. Meanwhile, after discovering her identity has been stolen, Maura enlists the help of Angela to find the culprit.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Spring Break From Hell
programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.desc: Melissa has isolated herself at home and lost many friends to avoid feeling the shame of what her food addiction has done to her body. Now, the only way to get her life back is to leave it behind to start a new one with Dr. Now's help in Houston.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.desc: Dr. Ebonie's skills are tested as she attempts to diagnose a patient with feet covered in huge masses. Dr. Brad is confronted with a dangerous case that could be related to the elephant man as well as a patient with paper thin skin.

programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Resisting Temptation
programme.desc: Learning she needs to lose 30 lbs to be eligible for bottom surgery, Jazz commits to losing weight. Later, Jazz and Jeanette participate in a debate over controversial research that suggests children shouldn't be placed on hormone blockers before puberty.

programme.desc: Adam and Danielle head to Nashville, leaving the family to watch the quints. But they may not be up to the challenge, especially when Hazel gives her uncle a big scare. While away, Adam confronts the fact he's not the only one suffering from his issues.

programme.desc: Kristy lost 100 pounds and is looking for the right dress to show off her new figure. Kristin lost 40 pounds and is excited to fit into dress samples.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What's My Style

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hunting the Hunters
programme.desc: Officers Adam Cheney and Geoff Pushee run into an aggressive and angry hunter while investigating a road hunting complaint.

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Inside the Bowl: PBXIII Rory
North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wild Home Invasion
programme.desc: Time is running out when an injured hiker must be rescued from Mount Chocorua, and on Squam Lake an illegal fishing tournament must be handled. A pesky bear finds its way inside a home in search of food, and a team is deployed to search for a young hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wild Home Invasion
programme.desc: Time is running out when an injured hiker must be rescued from Mount Chocorua, and on Squam Lake an illegal fishing tournament must be handled. A pesky bear finds its way inside a home in search of food, and a team is deployed to search for a young hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Long Shot
programme.desc: Simmons, Parker and Robertson catch sportsmen who fired from inside their truck. Spahr leads the search for a missing elderly woman in York County. The dive team is mustered to search for two duck hunters presumed drowned in the Sebasticook River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Antlers and Antics
programme.desc: Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder chase down a fleeing ATV. Warden Pelkey sends his K9 in search of evidence over a suspiciously shot moose. Warden MacCabe wrangles a tangled great blue heron.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed It and Reap
programme.desc: Harvest season is the game wardens' busiest time. Warden Dudley helps an Amish family save their corn crop from a bear. Wardens Carter and McBrine hunt for a man hiding out in a cabin. Sergeant Thrasher searches for an illegal marijuana crop grower.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Excuses, Excuses
programme.desc: Hunting season heats up as Warden Herring calls in the air wing to track illegal activity on a game preserve. Warden Blanchard catches an intentional violator red-handed. Wardens Carter and McBrine execute a search warrant on a known poacher.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Spotted Pampered Pups
programme.desc: A shy Cavalier King Charles Spaniel is coaxed out of her shell by her peppy aunt.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scary Tails
programme.desc: Jackson works with a cat, Skylar, who's literally afraid of her tail. Then, he meets a pair of guardians whose cat is constantly knocking things over, climbing up the window screens and spontaneously attacking. Finally, a disabled cat inspires people.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Young giraffe mum Tula gives birth, while both the penguin chicks and a silvery gibbon baby must face their fears as they grow up.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Levitating Lighthouse

programme.desc: Newlyweds agree they need to buy their first home in Denver, Colorado before they can adopt dogs again, but she insists on move-in ready, while he wants as many projects as possible.

programme.desc: A military family that's used to moving with little notice receives his latest post orders. They hope to find a forever home in Georgia where they can settle down when he retires in six years.

programme.desc: A man learns he must report for duty in six weeks, not six months, pushing him and his wife to quickly settle on a house in San Antonio. They find two good options, but the house hunt comes to a halt when she can't decide what's best for the family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle

programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Snapped: Janeene Jones
programme.desc: Allegations of real estate fraud and and rumors of murder have Sarasota Police on the tail of a criminal whose final plan to evade trouble lands her in the very hands she tried to avoid.

programme.title: Snapped: Carol Carlson
programme.desc: When a Kapowsin, Washington mother is discovered murdered on her couch in a compromised position, investigators must piece together all the evidence to determine if this was a random crime of opportunity or a façade to humiliate the victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Minnie Salinas
programme.desc: Police race for answers after an adored school teacher is found dead in her San Antonio apartment. A string of lies and betrayal comes to light, but when the case goes cold, one detective refuses to give up.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Banister
programme.desc: When two sisters' husbands turn up dead within weeks of each other, Florida detectives investigate whether the cases are a tragic coincidence or if they're related by something other than blood.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside The Episode: Liz Golyar
programme.desc: Every story has behind-the-scenes facts, insights, and often jaw-dropping allegations that we wish we had time to share on television. Well, now we can. This special episode features details about these investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Exhumed: Written in Blood/ Killer Cowboy
programme.desc: A typical summer morning for four-year-old Heidi Jones turned into a nightmare when she found her mother dead in the living room. Law enforcement work feverishly to solve the murder of Loretta Jones. An exhumation is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vendetta
programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder
programme.desc: When a brilliant scientist and devoted family man is found beaten to death, the evidence leads police to make arrests, but an astounding revelation turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Intentions
programme.desc: When a devoted mother about to embark on a new life is murdered in her own home, detectives follow the evidence through a tangled web of relationships to unmask a killer no one could have predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: When a loving father and beloved basketball coach is ruthlessly murdered in Tennessee, police decode a confusing array of evidence to unveil a killer who is shockingly close to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Regina Williams
programme.desc: A case that could be a hit-and-run murder or an abused woman or woman scorned.

programme.title: Snapped: Tyonne Palmer
programme.desc: A love triangle between a preacher, his son and his girlfriend ends in death.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Polands
programme.desc: Two brothers pull off an elaborate scheme in the desert to rob an armored van of $300,000. When investigators attempt to track down the illusive robbers, the case becomes a homicide once the bodies of the two guards driving the van turn up.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Romero and Self
programme.desc: In the fall of 1992, two brothers terrorize a California community when they embark on a 2-month crime spree that includes three brutal murders and many more near-death attacks. Investigators work to stop the killer siblings before they strike again.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Agofskys
programme.desc: Residents of quiet Noel, Missouri are shocked when the local bank is robbed in a brazen nighttime heist. The investigation takes a sinister turn when the bank’s president is found dead and a pair of brothers suddenly come into a lot of cash.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lunas
programme.desc: The Luna brothers take wildly divergent paths, one becoming a decorated army officer, while another rises in a Mexican cartel. When the brothers' worlds collide, a murder ultimately brings them all down.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A 4 year old girl abducted and raised by her kidnapper spends decades trying to get back home and she finally does. Her story had many ups and downs but the ending was extraordinary. As it turns out that ending was only the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Mystery of the Murdered Major
programme.desc: He was a military man, a respected Major in the US Army. When he was attacked in the middle of the night, police launched an investigation that would reveal wild secrets that might hold the key to murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House in the Woods
programme.desc: A hockey player finds his wife murdered in their home. His daughter says she saw a robber, but the killer's identity turns out to be far more complicated. Police had their suspects but her family had questions of their own.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Frantic
programme.desc: After Christina, the twenty-three-year-old fashionista, went out to a high-end shopping mall on a Friday night and vanished police questioned everyone. The friends she was with. Her ex-model boyfriend.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Player
programme.desc: A double murder revealed a double life. The victims were a well-respected couple. Their son played poker for a living. His alibi was his ace in the hole. But when detectives found key evidence, they thought they were holding all the cards.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Goldfinger Mystery
programme.desc: A couple made a fortune in gold, but money didn't buy happiness. They were headed for divorce when she was murdered. He was on tape, not at the crime scene, but police thought the video held the key to unlocking a mystery.

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must teach Kung Fu to a small village of pandas in order to defeat a supernatural villain.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A terrier named Max feels neglected when his owner brings home a new dog named Duke. After one fight, they get lost. They have to put their rivalry aside when they discover a bunny is building an army of abandoned pets to take revenge on the humans.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Better Off Sled
programme.desc: The battle is on when some angsty teenagers take over Louise, Gene and Tina's usual sledding territory, inciting an epic turf war. Bob steps in to help Linda who realizes she’s on crunch time to get three scarves knitted in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: UFO No You Didn't
programme.desc: Tina and her new science partner create a device that allows them to communicate with aliens, but their excitement turns to fear when they receive a dangerous warning message. Meanwhile, Bob attempts to sell mini coat racks he bought.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Lorenzo's Oil? No, Linda's

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Helen Hunt

programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty attempts to upset veteran Beta and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding main-event showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Whiplash attempts to stage a comeback against Gruff's flamethrowers and Underdog Rusty attempts an upset with veteran Beta. Hypershock does battle with Mammoth in a gear-grinding main event.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the surface of an ocean near Antarctica, sparking rumors of a mythological sea monster. An area of the US-Mexico border becomes an international mystery. Ancient rock carvings in a mountain range depict weird, unearthly beings.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado
programme.desc: Strange images from the jungles of Colombia could lead researchers to the legendary city of El Dorado. A bright green swirling spiral appears in the seas of the Persian Gulf. A massive complex suddenly appears secretive state of Myanmar.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Discovery on the Edge
programme.desc: Bringing scholars and skeptics together to solve the mystery of the Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police struggle to find a vicious killer despite having DNA evidence and a videotape of the suspect.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: What My Mother Knew
programme.desc: Every week Janine Sutphen went to symphony practice. One night, she didn't come home. Her husband reveals to police there's more to this housewife than anyone knew. But very quickly a secret comes out- leading investigators down a dark, twisted path.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. When the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: discovery+ 1st Look: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: A video-game player finds a nefarious new way to achieve internet fame.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: discovery+ 1st Look: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: A video-game player finds a nefarious new way to achieve internet fame.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: The Power of Love
programme.desc: Former childhood sweethearts, Jason and Missy, planned to kill Missy's elderly lover and inherit millions, but their plan quickly spiralled out of control.

programme.title: Love Kills: We Were Like Fire
programme.desc: When Judy and Duane meet, they both long for excitement and to escape the lives they live. Turns out, fate as more in store for them than they desire.

programme.title: Behind Mansion Walls: Kill for Cash
programme.desc: There aren't many downsides to being a millionaire. But one crime is inflicted exclusively on the rich – extortion. The extortionist is often someone from the victim's own inner circle. A friend of relative is more than willing to kill for cash.

programme.title: Behind Mansion Walls: Hidden Desires
programme.desc: Following two grisly murders, the perfect worlds of family men came crumbling down, revealing a life of scandal, debauchery and deceit.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: The DC Mansion Murders
programme.desc: In one of the most exclusive neighborhoods in Washington, DC, police discover a gruesome murder scene amongst the charred ruins of a mansion.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Thorny Rose of Texas
programme.desc: Buddy Musso lives a simple life at a New Jersey retirement community, but he longs for romance. When Buddy meets Suzanne Basso at a fair, love takes him to Texas where a house full of strangers quickly turns his hopeful dreams into a waking nightmare.

programme.title: I Witness: Mother Undercover
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, Carol Bushard's adopted son, Andy Bushard, mysteriously disappears. When police fail to act, Carol and her husband blaze their own investigative trail through the criminal back woods of a California mountain town.

programme.title: The Killer Closer: Deadly Dessert
programme.desc: Detective Lindy Gligorijevic handles a baffling case after a man opens fire on a ninja who broke into his home. As she unravels the events that led up to the shooting, it becomes a race to arrest the would-be killer before they finish the job.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Through the Roof
programme.desc: Steven and Jennifer have been burned by a bad home inspection before, and decided to upgrade to a new house, confident that it would have fewer problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Stacked Against Us
programme.desc: A newer house has plumbing, heating and electrical issues.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Bigger Not Better
programme.desc: Mitzi and Cory bought a big suburban house in a nice neighbourhood near the grandparents. Mike Holmes will show them bigger is not always better.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Boarded Up Beauty
programme.desc: Nicole is on a mission to save vacant homes from the wrecking ball and her latest project is taking on a boarded up and previously condemned home from the late 80s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Cabinets Remade
programme.desc: Turning her attention to the kitchen, Nicole must get creative and figure out how to update and reuse cabinets that where in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: From Charred to Charming
programme.desc: In the home stretch on her project in Detroit, Nicole must finish up the upper apartment which is the area the fire damaged the most. The community comes together to build an urban garden.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Five-Star Foyer
programme.desc: Nicole takes the dark and dim front entryway and opens it up, removing soffits, repairing original stained glass windows, and hunting for salvaged parts to rebuild the fabulous staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rebuilding the 100% Cabin and Restoring a Legacy
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take the 100% cabin to South Carolina where they rebuild it as a hunting cabin. While they are there, they work with the client's kids to build a camping cabin out of their ancestor's log home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Foldable Cabin
programme.desc: Mark brings one of his biggest ideas to life, a foldable steel cabin. The crew takes the cabin on its maiden voyage and unfolds it for the first time in the boneyard, then they add a timber frame facade and a complete barnwood interior to finish it off.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: North Jersey
programme.desc: Jordan Andino kicks off his night in northern New Jersey with coconut crab buns at Dullboy in Jersey City. For his next stop, he's headed just a few blocks away to Talde for Filipino-style short ribs.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Toronto
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is exploring the culinary delights of Toronto, Canada's most diverse city.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Fish and Fowl
programme.desc: In North Bend, Ore., Chef Roger Mooking meets up with Don Ivy, Chief of the Coquille Tribe. Roger and Don roast a school of salmon for a traditional tribal feast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: The Salt and the Sea

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Morning Afternoon or Night
programme.desc: Vampirina shows her daily routine from morning to night.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Dance
programme.desc: Daisy wants to enter the talent show but suddenly comes down with a bad case of stage fright. Enlisting help from the viewer, Mickey and his pals help Daisy rehearse and build her confidence in time to wow the crowd.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bow-tique
programme.desc: Minnie opens up a new store that is filled with different varieties of brightly collared bows and bowties.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower
programme.desc: With the help of Professor Von Drake's special Pitter Patter Glitter, Minnie and Daisy turn normal clouds into rain clouds so they can water their flower gardens in time for the big flower show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bee Story
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Chuggington: Wild Safari Park / Glow Koko
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Pikwik Pack: Hazel's Mishap / Axel's Lucky Day
programme.desc: Suki the hedgehog and her team deliver packages to the residents of Pikwik.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Once in a Pink Moon/ A Giganto Gallery
programme.desc: When Mount Oblivion belches pink dust that turns the moon pink, Bill must try some new things. Marsh creates art after accidentally stepping on Tiny's blank canvas.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sea Captain Mickey
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Clubhouse
programme.desc: Mickey leaves Donald in charge of the Clubhouse. But he and Goofy accidentally turn a small mess into a big mess, so the whole gang must work together to tidy up in time for a visit from Mother Goose, Clarabelle and her trio of singing chickens.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Oh, Toodles!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine's Day Mix-Up / A Stinky Story
programme.desc: When Ana's valentine is accidentally mailed to Italy, the Pugs must bring it back! The Pugs try to help a baby skunk find her way home without getting sprayed along the way.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: The Long Way Home/ Trade in the Shade
programme.desc: A shortcut turns out to not be shorter. Then, the gang learns why they should care about the needs of others.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Clumsy Catboy/ Gekko and the Mighty Moon Problem
programme.desc: Romeo plans to use his newest device to make everyone in the world so clumsy that they can’t stop him. Romeo creates a space laser to carve his face into the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko VS Armavillain / Super Super Cat Speed
programme.desc: Desperate to prove himself, Gekko recruits Armadylan for extra training. Catboy wants to increase his speed, but in doing so, drains power from his friends.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Gulpy, Gulpy Gators/ One Note Wonder
programme.desc: When one of the gators in Donny's Guply, Gulpy Gators game gets jammed with too many marbles, Doc diagnoses him with a case of Stuffedfulliosis and tells him he needs to stop eating when he gets full. Doc fixes a toy xylophone with a loose key.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: A Day Without Cuddles!/ Collide-o-scope
programme.desc: It’s international cuddle day: Lambie’s favourite holiday! When Doc arrives home from the science museum, she introduces a new toy, Kiara the kaleidoscope.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Caved In
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Man of the House
programme.desc: Captain Man decides to move in and protect Henry's family after Henry's mom has her purse stolen. Pretty soon Captain Man takes on a fatherly role and Henry doesn't like it.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Kid Grounded
programme.desc: When Henry is caught sneaking out at night, he is grounded, preventing him from completing his crime-fighting duties. While Piper drives him crazy at home, Charlotte steps into the sidekick role.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Ditch Day
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe use their powers to create some fun for themselves on Ditch Day, but when they remember the school has security cameras, they enlist Billy and Nora's help to erase the footage before their secret is uncovered.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebe's a Clone Now
programme.desc: After Phoebe commits herself to too many activities, Max helps her by creating a clone so she can be in two places at once. When the clone starts making trouble for the real Phoebe, Max must help to save Phoebe's reputation.

programme.title: The Thundermans: This Looks Like a Job for...
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe get jobs at a pizza parlour so they can get the new MEphone, both trying to impress the manager with their own creative ideas. When Max over promises on a huge order, they must work together to save their jobs.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Danger Force: Prank War
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: One Man Banned/ Frenemy Mine
programme.desc: After Timmy's rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music. Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Escape From Unwish Island/ The Gland Plan
programme.desc: Timmy's unwished wishes come back for revenge; Cosmo might lose his job as godparent.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pasture Bedtime/ Shop Girl
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Staycation/ Walking the Plankton
programme.desc: Patrick wants to take a vacation, but can't afford one, so SpongeBob comes up with a solution: a staycation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: It's Pony: Pet Pony/ Dog Day
programme.desc: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Tooth, the Whole Tooth and Nothing but the Tooth/ Mutiny on the Krusty Krab
programme.desc: Krabs leads the Krusty Krab's crew and customers back home when a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away. Patrick is afraid to let go of his last baby tooth.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob 129
programme.desc: Fleeing from SpongeBob and Patrick's incessant noise, Squidward winds up frozen in the Krusty Krab freezer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Suck Toad/ Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Brittany is preparing a class speech on 'inner beauty' when an endangered species makes its home on her face. Alvin believes that Kevin has a secret crush on one of the Chipettes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Meet the Odd Parents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Masked Magician/ The Big Bash
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Magician powers to perform at the fair; Cupid has a party at his house.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.desc: Abby is excited that her cousin Veronica is coming to the barnyard for a visit, but it turns out Veronica has turned from a lovable tomboy into a manipulative bombshell, bent on using Abby's friends to get what she wants.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: See Jimmy Run/ Trading Faces
programme.desc: Jimmy adapts his running shoes so that he can move at lightning speed; Jimmy comes up with an invention that will allow him to read Cindy's mind.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Krunch Time/ Substitute Creature
programme.desc: Jimmy comes up with the tastiest snack, Cheese Goobies; Miss Fowl becomes a plant.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Attack of the Mega Shredder!
programme.desc: Leo decides to sneak into Shredder's Lair alone only to face the biggest mutant threat yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Creeping Doom
programme.desc: After an accident, Donnie finds himself slowly losing his intelligence.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: A Friend Indeed
programme.desc: Evox targets the Beast Bots to stop the Rangers from forming their Megazord.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Cybergate Opens
programme.desc: Scrozzle's plan to free Evox from the Cyber Dimension is set in motion. The Rangers and an unexpected friend do all that they can to stop him.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Bug Busters
programme.desc: The Turtles look for a way to eliminate New York City's oozesquito problem.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Tour/ Loud Horse
programme.desc: Annie and Pony try to help Gerry pass the test to become a museum tour guide. When a noisy neighbor drives Annie to the brink, she and Pony have to find a way to quiet her down.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: All Aboard the Snakeybus
programme.desc: Jacksepticeye cruises around Miami in the Snakeybus, Pokimane goes for her first victory in Brawl Stars, and Markiplier takes his son for a wild ride in Guts N Glory.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Quietest Day Ever/ Bully Bromance Breakup
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create ninja outfits that make themselves invisible to anyone not wearing one.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Fruit Scoot Boogie
programme.desc: Crank becomes a ninja master, Jack explores his own private island, CupQuake plays I Am Bread, while Captain Sparklez goes extreme in Fortnite.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Meathead Justice/ Bwar-Mart
programme.desc: After Kick saves the DiPazzi twins' lives, they become indebted to him by their code of ethics. When they do not leave his side, he must go to extreme measures to get them out of his life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Gym Dandy/ Detained
programme.desc: Kick tries out for the school's sports teams, but causes chaos when he has trouble following Coach Sternbeck's rules. Then, Kick must team up with some unlikely allies to bring down the new Vice Principal and escape detention.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Big Mouth/ Last Fan Standing
programme.desc: Kick can't get a wink of sleep when Wacky Jackie and Cousin Kyle throw him a celebration in honour of his latest stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.desc: Kick and Gunther venture to the Old Country where Gunther is mistaken for a warrior.

programme.desc: Kick makes a promise to Brianna to help her get in a prestigious girls club.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dad's Car/ The Treasure of Dead Man Dave
programme.desc: Kick is about to be blamed for scratching Dad's car; Kick has to give an oral report.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Switching Gears/ Garage Banned

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Clean... to the Extreme/ Stand and Delivery
programme.desc: Kick accidentally breaks Gunther's dad's foosball table and must complete a series of favours to replace it before Gunther's dad gets home. Kick takes over the delivery services at Battlesnax and must defend delivery guarantee.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.desc: When a series of corpses with ties to Booth's former Army unit appear around D.C., Booth must dive into his past to find the killer before the killer finds Booth.

programme.title: Bones: The Grief and the Girl
programme.desc: A recent loss creates a rift between Booth and Brennan, as they deal with their grief in different ways. Meanwhile, an old flame from Brennan's past comes to visit.

programme.title: Bones: The Steel in the Wheels
programme.desc: When a young man dies in a horrendous hay baler accident, Booth, Brennan and Aubrey slap on trashy disguises and go undercover at a rowdy demolition derby competition to investigate the case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Carrier
programme.desc: NCIS Special Agent Tony DiNozzo assists the New Orleans team when a Navy lieutenant on leave dies of the bubonic plague. The team races to locate all additional sailors on liberty, control a potential outbreak and determine the source of the disease.

programme.title: Charmed: That '70s Episode
programme.desc: For protection, the sisters time travel to the 1970s where they encounter their family.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Identity Crisis

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A petty officer's murder leads the team to a family-owned night club where Pride's mother used to perform weekly. Also, Lasalle must urgently return home to Alabama after receiving an unexpected call from his family.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: A New Dawn
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer who was in town to help a refugee family being recruited by terrorists. Also, Wade works on the special election campaign for Mayor Zahra Taylor that takes place during Mardi Gras.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Mile

programme.desc: Will competes with his friend, a struggling stand-up comic, at a comedy club showcase.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
