programme.title: Movie: 27 Dresses
programme.desc: A perennial bridesmaid struggles to accept that her sister is marrying her secret crush.

programme.title: Movie: Follow Me to Daisy Hills
programme.desc: A woman is put in an awkward situation when her father asks for help with the family business from her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: A young celebrity marriage counselor is left at the altar of her own publicized wedding. To save face, she accepts an offer from her contractor, who steps in as a groom and marries her.

programme.title: Movie: A Country Wedding
programme.desc: A country western star returns to his hometown to sell his childhood home. Upon his arrival, he meets the girl he proposed to when he was eight. Faced with old feelings, he will discover what really matters in life.

programme.title: Movie: Nature of Love
programme.desc: A city girl is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort where she faces her fears and tries out the camp's activities with the help of a handsome outdoorsman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: Frasier: Bully for Martin
programme.desc: Martin is verbally abused at his job and a protective Frasier meddles and complains.

programme.title: Frasier: Mother Load
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne's domestic bliss is ruined by disruptive, interfering and conniving relatives.

programme.title: Frasier: Mother Load
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne's domestic bliss is ruined by disruptive, interfering and conniving relatives.

programme.title: Frasier: Juvenilia
programme.desc: Frasier hooks up with generation Y, but the teen scene has him on the run.

programme.title: Frasier: The Proposal
programme.desc: Niles leaves nothing to chance when he plans the perfect evening to propose to Daphne.

programme.title: Frasier: Wheels of Fortune
programme.desc: A battle-scarred Frasier is unimpressed when his scheming ex-brother-in-law rolls in.

programme.title: Reba: Issues
programme.desc: After observing their constant bickering, Reba and Van's boss insist they see an occupational therapist. Meanwhile, Brock and Barbra Jean consult a sleep doctor.

programme.title: Reba: Brock's Got Stones
programme.desc: While Barbra Jean is away in St. Louis, Reba has to take care of an ailing Brock. Elsewhere, Cheyenne volunteers at a homeless shelter, but is disappointed when she is assigned the unglamorous task of doing dishes in the kitchen.

programme.title: Reba: Parenting With Puppets
programme.desc: After Jake lies about breaking Reba's lamp, Reba is forced to retract her criticism of Barbra Jean's parenting skills. Meanwhile, Brock and Van are mistaken for a gay couple when they spend their 'guy time' at a day spa.

programme.title: Reba: Don't Mess With Taxes
programme.desc: When the IRS audits Reba, she discovers that Brock has a few secrets he doesn't want the IRS to find out about. Meanwhile, Van receives a lot of attention from Cheyenne's classmates when he takes part in a sociology project about marriage.

programme.title: Reba: The Goodbye Guy
programme.desc: In the wake of Barbra Jean telling the IRS that Reba and Brock owe $75,000 in back taxes, Brock decides to pay off the debt by selling his house and moving to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Reba: The Trouble With Dr. Hunky
programme.desc: Reba goes on a date with Dr. Jack Morgan, who has returned to Houston with the intention of resuming his romance with Reba. Later, a startling admission by Jack has Reba seeking advice from Brock.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bringing Up Baby
programme.desc: Rose inherits her late uncle's estate, provided she takes care of his prized pig 'Baby.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: The girls hire a new housekeeper and she puts a curse on their house.

programme.title: Movie: Like Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: A cat lover and dog lover are both heading to same beach for two different reasons. He is there to work on his thesis and she is there to escape the shambles of her life.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: As she considers giving up on her artistic dreams, Jamie paints a vision board that brings her success and love - only to discover that the mystery man in her painting isn't who she thinks.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco
programme.desc: Michael gets into the café/ disco scene. Meanwhile, Pam and Jim decide to take a secret trip.

programme.title: The Office: Company Picnic
programme.desc: Michael and Holly are reunited at the annual Dunder Mifflin company picnic. Meanwhile, the office competes in the picnic's volleyball tournament.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip
programme.desc: Michael feels left out as the rest of the office gossips about the summer interns. While Michael searches for the next juicy rumour to share, Andy struggles with heterosexuality.

programme.title: The Office: The Meeting
programme.desc: Michael starts to feel insecure and defensive after a request from Jim. Dwight convinces Toby to look into Darryl's worker's comp claim. Pam tries to deal with the guest list of the wedding.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: February 4, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: The Office: The Promotion
programme.desc: David lets everyone know that not everyone will be getting a raise. Dwight finally hits his breaking point with Jim and looks around the office for support. Pam asks for cash instead of wedding gifts.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.title: South Park: Child Abduction Is Not Funny
programme.desc: In an effort to protect their children from kidnappers, the parents hire the owner of City Wok Restaurant to build the Great Wall of South Park. During the construction he is harrassed by Mongolians intent on breaking down the City Wall.

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Kyle is on his deathbed with a rare kidney disease. Cartman is found to be the perfect donor, but withholds his kidney until Kyle can pay him 10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!

programme.desc: George's father undergoes surgery for his cancer after a successful operation on his heart. Thatcher Grey visits Seattle Grace in order to see his new granddaughter while Meredith discovers that Derek has trouble sleeping peacefully at night.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Six Days
programme.desc: George's father undergoes surgery for his cancer after a successful operation on his heart. Thatcher Grey visits Seattle Grace in order to see his new granddaughter while Meredith discovers that Derek has trouble sleeping peacefully at night.

programme.title: The Closer: Problem Child
programme.desc: The case of a troubled missing boy quickly turns into a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Closer: Sudden Death
programme.desc: When Sanchez's little brother is shot, the team turns its efforts to finding out if this is related to a past case of the detective's. Meanwhile, a reporter accuses Brenda and her squad of only working on cases that are connected to the rich and powerful.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cashed Out
programme.desc: Det. Julio Sanchez's application to become a foster parent is jeopardized by his reactions to a particularly gruesome murder after the Major Crimes Division finds a chopped up body burned to bits in the barbecue pit of an L.A. Park.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: When a pair of British tourists get attacked during a Venice Beach robbery, L.A.'s twenty billion dollar tourist industry is threatened by an English journalist riding their tragedy to a career high.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Moral Hazard
programme.desc: After a shootout in a tow yard leaves three people dead, Major Crimes must scramble to find a disturbed man with a bag full of guns and a long list of grievances before he kills again. Meanwhile, Rusty goes against LAPD policy while looking for evidence.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal
programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: The Strange Case of Dr. Gilmer
programme.desc: A beloved physician to commits a violent murder and a doctor investigates whether a rare disease could have driven them to do it.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: When You Die
programme.desc: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they and what causes them? And are they real?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: BattleBots: Turning Up the Heat
programme.desc: Slick-driving Whiplash looks to get its championship aspirations back on track against Gruff's menacing flamethrowers. Underdog Rusty tries attempts to upset veteran Beta, and Hypershock locks horns with Mammoth in a gear-grinding showdown.

programme.title: BattleBots: Hit the Jackpot!
programme.desc: Desperate to avoid a winless season, Huge faces Kraken. It's veteran vs. rookie as Lock-Jaw fights Jackpot, and only one can go 3-0. Tournament favorite Tombstone protects his crown against a bot that was built to dethrone him: Skorpios!

programme.title: BattleBots: Hit the Jackpot!
programme.desc: Huge faces Kraken hoping to avoid a winless season, then it's veteran vs. rookie with Lock-Jaw fighting Jackpot. Later, tournament favourite Tombstone faces off with a bot that was built to dethrone him: the great Skorpios.

programme.title: BattleBots: Now or Never
programme.desc: Tonight every fight has Championship consequences. In the Main Event, Copperhead and Black Dragon battle for high seedings, and all the rest are fighting for survival. A win means life, and a loss and it's time to power down for good.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Duck Only A Mother Could Love
programme.desc: Elite bots Tombstone and Sawblaze go to war in the BattleBox, as the competition heats up to become the 2019 BattleBots champion.

programme.desc: Elite bots Tombstone and Sawblaze go to war in the BattleBox, as the competition heats up to become the 2019 BattleBots champion.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Gator Bait
programme.desc: Waist-deep in the backwater swamps of Louisiana's Atchafalaya river basin, EJ and Jeff find themselves surrounded by alligators and poisonous snakes. With no clear way to safety, they must find a direction out of the bayou and onto safe dry land.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Blackout
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Republic of Georgia, located between Russia and Turkey, EJ and Jeff find themselves in a nightmarish scenario as they're surrounded by 800-pound bears and trapped in a pitch-black cavern.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror of the Bell Witch
programme.desc: Josh Gates dives into one of America's oldest witch stories. In the Tennessee backwoods, locals report being attacked in a vast cave system. Jess and Phil go underground and uncover frightening piles of bones as well as potential human remains.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Submerged Treasure
programme.desc: With an access tunnel to the underground cavern finally opened, and a tantalizing clue discovered, Duane's son Chad takes a risky dive into the flooded cave system, and what he finds defies all explanation.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Mormon Gold
programme.desc: Duane decides that the flooded cave is too dangerous to dive into again, forcing the team to explore new access points to the underground cavern system. But something lurking in the darkness forces everyone to reevaluate their safety.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Someone Was Here
programme.desc: While searching unexplored areas of the ranch for an alternate entrance to the cavern system, the team discovers mysterious ancient markings on a cliffside and a mining shaft dug deep into the mountain that could lead them right to the gold.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Trespassers
programme.desc: Duane employs ground-penetrating radar to scan the land near a potential drill site, leading to a mysterious finding. Trespassers prompt Charlie to increase security on the ranch with a camera system, capturing a frightening sight in the dead of night.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I'm So Dead
programme.desc: A woman stops eating because she believes she is dead. A runner goes blind in one eye during a marathon and takes a detour to the ER. Doctors are baffled by an ER tech's stroke-like symptoms, until someone he loves also becomes ill.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I Can't Remember
programme.desc: A patient can't remember what happened in the past 20 years. An asthma patient runs away but returns in handcuffs.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Cows and Stilettos
programme.desc: A man crashes his car into a cow and comes to the ER covered in manure. A woman has a stiletto heel jammed into her cheek.

programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale: Portillo's Hot Dog

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Culinary Tornado
programme.desc: Simon Majumdar and Anne Burrell, are poised to give Bobby Flay a run for his money; and they've brought two well-rounded chefs to do their dirty work.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Shore Fire Strategy
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Mario Cantone want nothing more than for Bobby Flay to crash and burn! Martin Rios and Geoff Johnson are hoping they have an edge over each other and Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Welcome to New York!
programme.desc: Anthony Lamas fro Kentucky and Jennifer Nguyen from Washington take the stage in New York for their chance to Beat Bobby Flay. Sitting in the judges seats are Bobby's mentors Chef Jonathan Waxman and from the Food Network, Sunny Anderson.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pot Calling the Kettle Beat
programme.desc: Distinguished chef Jonathan Waxman and Chopped judge Aaron Sanchez have come to ruin Bobby's day, bringing in two chefs who are no strangers to battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: East vs. West
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and Chef Michael Symon hold nothing back as they try to get Bobby Flay beat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Look Radishing
programme.desc: It's a battle of the South vs. Southwest as Chef Charlie Loomis of Chattanooga faces off against Chef Israel Rivera from Albuquerque, N.M., for a shot at Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The summer heat wave takes hold of the kitchen, and Chef Carla Hall tries to beat the heat with TV announcer Steve Higgins. They recruit red-hot chefs Kathy Sidell and Vinson Petrillo to light a fire under Bobby Flay and take him out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Friday Night Bites
programme.desc: Ultracompetitive pals Amanda Freitag and Sunny Anderson team up to tackle, trounce and otherwise demolish Bobby Flay. Tampa chef Michael Buttacavoli and New Jersey's Chef Scott McDonald face off on the gridiron to put a big fat L in Bobby's record.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: To Contend and Serve!
programme.desc: Naval chef Carla Harris brings her grit against seriously competitive chef Noah Schwartz, while Anne Burrell of Worst Cooks in America, and The Kitchen's Geoffrey Zakarian use their expertise to determine who has the arsenal to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Better Late Than Never
programme.desc: Artist-turned-chef Melissa Mayer and former sports reporter Jen Royle intend to prove that even those who start late in life can compete with the best of the best!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Hold On For One More Flay
programme.desc: Bobby is not safe when Carnie Wilson joins up with her teammate from "The Kitchen", Katie Lee. They bring in from Philly, Jeremy Nolen as he battles against Indian grill master, Vijay Sadhu for a chance to go up against Iron Chef, Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You're Masa-ing with Me!
programme.desc: Food Network's Jet Tila and Chef Carla Hall are hoping to get sweet revenge over Bobby Flay. They bring in Asian food specialists Chef Dan Jacobs and Chef Tony Nguyen to dodge Bobby's curveballs and take home a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Culinary Knockout
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio play referee in a match to take Bobby Flay down. Entering the arena with their eye on the prize is San Antonio's Chef Geronimo Lopez and Philippines native Chef Frances Tariga.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Both Sides of the Coin
programme.desc: Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell and Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli hope that they've got all their Bobby Flay-beating bases covered.

programme.desc: A country boy and a Greco chef challenge Bobby.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast

programme.desc: Todd finally finds good gold at his new High Bar mine. Parker gives his foreman Rick his own operation and when Tony and Minnie decide to cut the dredge crew's pay, a key crew member calls it quits.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Misery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Todd battles to get the 50oz of gold he needs to keep his High Bar mine open. Tony brings all his children together to get his Paradise Hill claim up and running. Parker is furious at a series of human errors which cost him thousands of dollars.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Crane, No Gain

programme.title: Gold Rush: Watery Grave
programme.desc: Tony arrives to find his million-dollar dredge in disaster. While Rick is at his grandpa's funeral, Parker shuts him down by taking his equipment, and the Hoffmans discover that their wash-plant doesn't work in their new mine.

Gold Rush: Mega Barge and Kid Commando
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman digs deeper than ever in a desperate search for gold. Tony Beets hauls a monster down the Yukon River. Parker Schnabel's $600,000 wash-plant starts to shake itself apart.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Historic Haul
programme.desc: In this mega-packed episode, Tony Beets breaks records with the biggest gold haul in Gold Rush history. Parker Schnabel battles to save his dream washplant, and after seven weeks at the Buckland, Todd Hoffman's finally on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Go Down Fighting
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman hits rock bottom when, after seven seasons, a key crew member quits. Tony Beets transforms some rusty relics into a monster power barge, and a troubled Parker Schnabel misses his own birthday party.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Game Over
programme.desc: With no paycheck for five weeks, members of Todd Hoffman's close-knit team turn on each other. Parker's gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a mega-trailer to move his barge, but gets his measurements wrong.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fuzzy Polar Puppies
programme.desc: Nanook, a shy Chinook, is the only boy in a litter of four, training to be a sled dog; Rocky the Labradoodle and his brother Stanley grow up poolside; Rollo and Pickles are wiener dogs who aspire to be athletes like their mom, a champion hotdog.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Katrina Storms In
programme.desc: Jackson dives deep into the world of a Los Angeles feral colony where he and his team of trappers must make order out of a world of wild cat-crawling chaos. Then, Jackson visits a family too afraid to furnish their house because of their cat's spraying.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Croc Mission Lives On
programme.desc: The family makes their annual trip to the Steve Irwin Wildlife Reserve to capture, study and release wild crocodiles. They continue the mission started by Steve & Terri, providing scientific research vital to the protection of Australia's apex predators.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Territorial Chimps
programme.desc: A new female chimp arrives at Chester Zoo, the runt of the otter litter goes missing, and cheetah mum Kinky Tail is on the operating table.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Record High Recording Studio
programme.desc: Pete builds a high tech recording studio oasis up in the trees that perfectly blends the heart of music with the wild of the outdoors. Upon completion, Grammy-award winning megastar, CeeLo Green arrives to lay down a brand new track.

programme.title: Tanked!: Rock N' Roll Eruption!
programme.desc: A client requests an eight piece drum set tank that is fully playable, and the owners of the Lahaina Grill want to bring a little piece of Hawaii to their new bar.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Tia scrambles after receiving a phone call about a severely emaciated pit bull, one of the worst cases she has ever seen. And, a campaign to build a shelter in a NY prison depends on Earl to convince authorities about the benefits of prison dog programs.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saving Each Other
programme.desc: A veteran makes a heart-breaking plea for help to be reunited with his dogs. A shelter seeks Tia's help when they are overwhelmed by dogs that have been rescued from shocking conditions.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: While planning a family reunion, Madea finds herself plagued by family trouble, including her sister's death, a niece's wedding to a handsome, but abusive man and a troubled and angry court appointed ward.

programme.title: Movie: House Party
programme.desc: Despite his father's wishes, an urban teenager schemes to attend his friend's party.

programme.title: Movie: Think Like a Man Too
programme.desc: A group of friends comes together for a wedding in Las Vegas. Various mishaps and misadventures lead the gang into some very sticky situations, and what was supposed to be a romantic weekend away begins to veer in another direction.

programme.title: No Joke: Chris Rock and Gayle King
First Wives Club: Plan B
programme.desc: A spending spree with Derek's money gets Hazel financially cut off. Ari agrees to be Hazel's lawyer, and is put in an awkward position when David accepts a donation from Derek. After trying therapy with Gary, Bree realizes she wants a divorce.

programme.title: Bigger: Is Bigger Really Better?
programme.desc: Things get a little hectic for Layne as she tries to juggle Greg and Reggie, all while trying to hire a new employee. Veronica learns her nemesis, Shelley, is oneuppingher in real estate. Deon vies for a promotion at the accounting firm.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: California Dreamin' (All the Cleves Are Brown)
programme.desc: The Browns pack their bags and move to Los Angeles, where Cleveland pursues his life-long dream of becoming a major league baseball scout.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Hangover Part Tubbs
programme.desc: When Donna runs for the school board, she tries to keep an embarrassing Cleveland out of her campaign. But her efforts blow up in her face when he 'kills' a new friend playing 'The Hurt Locker' game.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Who Done Did It?
programme.desc: When Cleveland starts seeking revenge on everyone in Stoolbend, things get out of hand and he's accused of a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: The Parkers: Practice What You Preach
programme.desc: Nikki's past causes turmoil in the church when her old friend becomes the new reverend.

programme.title: The Parkers: Could It Be You?
programme.desc: Andell is desperate for some alone time with her new boyfriend, so she sets up a date.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Little Change Never Hurt Anyone
programme.desc: Just as Nikki and Johnnie's relationship gets serious, he is offered a job in New York.

programme.title: The Parkers: At Last
programme.desc: While Nikki plans for her wedding, Professor Oglevee realizes he is in love with her.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Fist and the Furious
programme.desc: Cleveland feels bad for Dr. Fist because he has no friends, so he decides to make him 'one of the guys.'

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Squirt's Honor
programme.desc: Donna forces Rallo to sign up for Stoolbend's version of the Boy Scouts, the 'Freedom Squirts.' Rallo warms up to the idea when he realizes that he can make some extra cash selling candy bars to benefit a non-existent youth orchestra.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Grave Danger
programme.desc: Rallo heads to East Stoolbend to stay at Robert’s apartment for the weekend. But when Robert abandons him for a trip to Baltimore, he’s forced to make friends with the tough neighbourhood kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: Switch Hitting
programme.desc: When super cool and white exec Jay Sloane challenges Dre over his street cred and picks inept Charlie for a big urban market account, Dre finds himself questioning his 'blackness.' Pops gets a letter from the IRS and fears the worst.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap
programme.desc: Teenager Zoey goes through a mini-rebellion phase by pushing boundaries and acting out. Dre wants to lay down the law while Bow insists on a softer approach like her mom did with her.

programme.title: The Parkers: Grape Nuts
programme.desc: When Nikki decides to pledge at same sorority as her daughter, Kim is less than pleased.

programme.title: The Parkers: Scammed Straight
programme.desc: Looking for extra income to help pay for college expenses, Kim and Nikki become psychics.

programme.title: The Parkers: Daddy's Girl

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Stiff Competition

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cut and Run

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Tilted Flop

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: Two women strike up a fast friendship and move in together. But a lack of privacy and a secret relationship rips apart the harmony, and a battle for control ends in a brutal murder.

programme.desc: 19-year-old Micah Rineis striking out on her own when she falls for fellow college student Thomas Pate. But when their love takes her far away from family and friends, Micah begins to wonder who she can really trust.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Virtual Lust
programme.desc: A lonely man in Florida has a whirlwind romance with a flight attendant, but her secrets will soon lead him down a path of betrayal and murder...Then, in suburban Seattle, the real truth about a picture perfect family is revealed when someone vanishes.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Playing With Hearts
programme.desc: In Sioux Falls' deaf community, Darlene Vander Giesen finds the perfect romance until a jealous friend severs the bond. Later, pilot Lance Anderson makes flight attendant, Kathi, his wife. When she meets Capt. Gerald Russell, heavy turbulence ensues.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: The Perfect Target
programme.desc: With her two young kids strapped in the backseat of her minivan, a Miami woman is carjacked in broad daylight from the parking lot of her local church. And to protect her family, she must do every terrible thing her sadistic kidnapper demands.

programme.title: Gone: Missing Michele
programme.desc: 32-year-old Michele Whitaker is leading a troubled life when she disappears without a trace. Her family and local police investigate every possible lead for 6 painful years until one day when a phone call gives them the answers they're looking for.

programme.title: Killer Unknown: When the Devil Calls
programme.desc: A devastated family recounts the horrifying moments leading up to the murder of Veda Woodson on a deserted road. Also, on the Dean case, early investigators look into Dena's family to arrive at a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Nightmare on Bennington Drive
programme.desc: This quaint neighbourhood in Jacksonville, Florida seems to be an unlikely place for any crime at all, let alone murder.

programme.title: My Dirty Little Secret: Depraved
programme.desc: Marlene and Bill Major are young lovers who appear to be living in bliss.But behind closed doors, this wholesome family is anything but.When a house built on lies starts to crumble, the consequences are horrifying, dark secrets start to unearth.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Blinding Fantasy
programme.desc: They say opposites attract, that's how Navy man Cory Voss meets his wife Cat. When money runs dry she seeks the attention of a seemingly wealthier man. But when Cat finds out he isn't who he says the Voss family falls apart.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Liar's Poker
programme.desc: In Reno, NV, casino "pit boss" Jerry Cassadav falls for sexy Sharee Miller. They begin a steamy online affair, but their relationship gets tricky when Sharee tells Jerry that she's married to a mobster who has found out about their affair.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell Hounds
programme.desc: A woman in Dayton, Ohio welcomes a young family when they move into the long derelict house next door. But escalating fights over everything from treatment of pets to treatment of children leads to a violent, bloody, and deadly confrontation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Forever and a Day
programme.desc: When a former police officer is dumped she takes the law into her own hands; a quiet housewife buries her marriage problems in the garden; and an excited fiancée turns into the worst kind of bridezilla.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Bloody Betrayal
programme.desc: Growing up with a disfigured face, Patti Donahue feels like the butt of every joke. As an adult, Patti vows to get the last laugh. And when she marries an innocent father of three, she turns their lives into a world of deception, abuse and murder.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: The Boston Bandits
programme.desc: Up against an impenetrable code of silence in one of Boston's toughest neighbourhoods, a special FBI Task Force faces one of its toughest challenges yet, taking down a crew of professional robbers who've proven they're willing to kill.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Argo: The Secret Story
programme.desc: America is at its knees as the infamous US Embassy Hostage crisis begins, but then the CIA discovers that six diplomats have secretly escaped. When they recruit in their ace 'rescue' agent Tony Mendez to get them out, he devises a 'Hollywood'- plan.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.desc: Magic is in the air as design duo Cherise and Kim go head-to-head against creative craftsmen Joe and Andrew.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Clash of the Couples
programme.desc: New York flippers Amanda and Nick go toe-to-toe against Christina and Billy, two designing sweethearts from New Jersey.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Grillin' It
programme.desc: Since humans first discovered cooking with fire, they've been perfecting the art of the grill. Eddie Jackson chases after the smoky undertones and sweet, bitter char that only flame-grilling creates.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Bronx
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the international flavors of one of America's most diverse communities, the Bronx, New York. He finds Italian-influenced bites like dry-aged pork sausage, spicy Jamaican meat pastries and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: St. Louis: Pig Snouts and Paddlefish
programme.desc: Andrew comes to St. Louis, a city where the food reflects the diversity of the neighbourhoods and the people who live there.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Northern California
programme.desc: Andrew visits Northern California where people are re-inventing they way they look at food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Tour/ Loud Horse
programme.desc: Annie and Pony try to help Gerry pass the test to become a museum tour guide. When a noisy neighbor drives Annie to the brink, she and Pony have to find a way to quiet her down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karate Choppers
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Sandy's incessant Karate sparring is starting to wreak havoc in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Girls/ Held Back
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isn't only a guy thing.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Birthday Bashed/ Momnipresent
programme.desc: Timmy refuses to celebrate his birthday; it's SepTIMberfest, a big Hollywood event.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Mud With Power/ Legal Beagle
programme.desc: After realizing that he's not in charge of anything, Dudley orders a packet of Mudbuglets to take care of. Then, TUFF discovers a book of laws written by Daniel Boone Looney and must obey them no matter how crazy the laws are.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard: Bling My Barn
programme.desc: When Otis accidentally blows up the barn, they audition for Bling My Barn, a home improvement show that fixes up barns for deserving families - and win the blinging thanks to Pig dressing up as an adorable pink baby.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Journey to the Centre of Carl/ Professor Calamitous
programme.desc: Professor Calamitous schemes to make Jimmy his slave and forcing him to do unwanted acts.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Maximum Hugh/ Aaughh! Wilderness!
programme.desc: Jimmy outfits his dad with a bionic sweatband to give their team the competitive edge.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Room of One's Own/ Carts and Crafts
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be. When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in contest to win a new bike.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: We're The Chipmunks/ Save the Dance
programme.desc: When a new boy band, 'The Hipmunks,' tries to steal the spotlight, the Chipmunks are forced to compete in a battle of the bands.The Principal gives Alvin and Derek an ultimatum. If they fight, the school dance will be canceled.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Going Green/ Tattle Tail
programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fourfold Trap
programme.desc: The Turtles are baited by an unknown enemy into deadly traps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dinosaur Seen in Sewers!
programme.desc: When Raph makes a new friend in Zog, an alien Triceraton, he may have bitten off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Thrills and Drills
programme.desc: Ravi must face one of his worst fears when it interferes with his Ranger duties.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gumbus/ Mrs. Cuddles
programme.desc: Leo, Mikey and April investigate a mysterious specter that haunts a themed supermarket./ April and the brothers make Raph face his greatest fear… an adorable kids’ TV show bunny.

programme.title: It's Pony: Useful/ Stompy!
programme.desc: Annie fears Dad will find Pony useless to the farm and get ride of him. Then, while fighting with Dog, Pony accidentally stomps on Annie's foot, just when she is all set to play soccer.

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb-Busters!/ Not Phineas and Ferb
programme.desc: Irving's brother, Albert, claims to be the 'Truth Detector' and Candice enlists friends.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House
programme.desc: Peter becomes friends with a cool, handsome paramedic named Stryker Foxx. Wrapped up in his newfound 'coolness,' he soon dumps Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland.

programme.title: Family Guy: Nanny Goats
programme.desc: The Griffins get a nanny for the kids, courtesy of Lois' parents, which gives Peter and Lois the opportunity to reconnect.

programme.title: Family Guy: Follow the Money
programme.desc: After Chris gets a special one-dollar bill for his birthday and quickly loses it, the dollar gets passed from character to character throughout Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors
programme.desc: In a special anthology-style episode, Peter gets fired from his job at the brewery in the signature styles of three famous Hollywood film directors.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy
programme.desc: After Peter and the guys get caught pretending to be military veterans and are found guilty of the Stolen Valor Act, a judge sentences them to join the U.S. Coast Guard.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Team Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns decides to join Homer's bowling team after becoming the sponsor. Bart's shirt leads to the implementation of uniforms at school, causing a loss of individuality and creativity.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Homer's garage sale is upstaged by George Bush, who is moving in across the street. When Bart receives a spanking, Homer starts a prank war that escalates into a one-on-one confrontation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Scenes From a Class Struggle in Springfield
programme.desc: While wearing an expensive suit found at an outlet mall, Marge meets a former schoolmate who invites her and the family to the country club. Marge soon becomes obsessed with trying to fit in with high society, while Homer takes up golf.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Fink
programme.desc: Bart inadvertently gets Krusty in trouble with the IRS by uncovering Krusty's tax-cheating ways. Soon after, Krusty is presumed dead when his plane crashes and a heartbroken Bart keeps thinking he sees Krusty in public.
