programme.title: Snapped: Brittany Norwood
programme.desc: An upscale store becomes a shop of horrors when a woman snaps and her co-worker is the victim of her rage.

programme.title: Snapped: Nicole Abusharif
programme.desc: A lesbian love triangle turns deadly when one woman disappears and police look to the other two for answers.

programme.title: Snapped: Kristi Lunbery
programme.desc: A woman confesses to her husband's unsolved murder; though is she telling the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Katharine Holmes
programme.desc: A woman complains about her ex-husband, but her venting has deadly consequences.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects until the truth reveals a terrible plot to get revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars: Sheila Davalloo
programme.desc: The only convicted murderer featured on 'Snapped' twice, Davalloo tells her story in an exclusive prison interview. We look back at the crimes that put her behind bars, reveal more details from her past, and examine a possible connection to a cold case.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Gaiser
programme.desc: A wife is the target of three assassination attempts, and her husband and his lover point the fingers at each other.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Heath Bar Farm
programme.desc: A popular teacher was savagely murdered in her home. There would be an arrest, a trial, and a conviction. When a bombshell came in after the verdict, the convicted murderer was given a chance at freedom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Diabolical
programme.desc: A newlywed received terrifying emails with threats of kidnapping and death. The emails appeared to come from an ex-girlfriend. But hiding behind the threats was a cyber-secret. It was a dangerous game with someone playing for keeps.

programme.title: Snapped: Jessica Hill
programme.desc: A man dies in an apparent freak accident, but soon his wife is accused of murder and more.

programme.title: Snapped: Taylor Marks
programme.desc: A mother responds to her estranged daughter's call for help and walks into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Snapped: Stephanie Lazarus
programme.desc: An L.A. police detective turns suspect when DNA cracks a 23-year murder mystery.

programme.title: Snapped: Rachel Wade
programme.desc: A love triangle pushes two teenage girls into a deadly confrontation.

programme.title: Dateline: The Summer of Manson
programme.desc: Roger Smith, Charles Manson's former parole officer, sits down for a rare interview. He discusses how Manson's failed music career drove him to find new ways to control his followers.

programme.title: Dateline: Good and Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at an Anaheim trash facility, a dedicated detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know that search will bring her face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Mysteries & Scandals: Serial Killers of the ‘80s
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez was a satanic killer terrorizing an entire state who sexually assaulted his victims. Aileen Wuornos, a highway hooker with a gun. Doug Clark and Carol Bundy prowled the Sunset Strip for sex and victims.

programme.title: Exhumed: A Murderer Among Us
programme.desc: When grandmother Erma Prince dies after a simple hip surgery, fears spread that a killer nurse could be responsible. The police do everything they can to track down the killer including exhuming Erma's body.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Day She Disappeared
programme.desc: A young mother disappeared one morning. Her husband said she went out for a run and never came home. She was found strangled to death.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Collision
programme.desc: A wife and a mistress vying for the same man, end up in a high-speed showdown on a highway. The man of their dreams, on his motorcycle nearby, was struck and killed. His wife arrested for his murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Heart Of Darkness
programme.desc: Vacationers turned prisoners, a mother, her son and a cousin kidnapped by terrorists. It was a harrowing international hostage drama and the price of freedom was a huge ransom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A California couple's romantic getaway on a boat turns tragic when the young wife and mother is lost at sea.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong at the house Ralph Candelario shared with his second wife... a robbery that resulted in the murder of Pam. But when police learned the antique dealer's first wife had disappeared, they took a closer look.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Fat Tony and Selma are in love and get married after a whirlwind courtship. To ease Marge's reservations about the marriage, Fat Tony invites Homer and Marge to a weekend getaway at the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 500 Keys
programme.desc: When the Simpsons discover a collection of keys, which open every door in Springfield, Lisa stumbles upon an eerie hidden classroom beneath Springfield Elementary School.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Falcon and the D'Ohman
programme.desc: Homer befriends a reserved security guard recently hired by the nuclear power plant. Plagued by violent flashbacks from his past as a CIA agent, he must overcome his tortured nightmares to save Homer from a Ukrainian terrorist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Replaceable You
programme.desc: Bart's science fair project, a mechanical baby seal, outshines Lisa's asteroid model and becomes a popular pet among the retirement home patrons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Food Wife
programme.desc: Marge takes Bart and Lisa on a weekend excursion and when an unexpected restaurant detour awakens their taste buds, fellow foodies inspire them to start a food blog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Book Job
programme.desc: Lisa becomes disheartened when she learns the shocking truth behind the 'tween lit' industry and her beloved fantasy novel characters, but Homer decides to cash in on the craze and forms a team to group-write the next 'tween lit' hit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man in Blue Flannel Pants
programme.desc: The Simpsons host a tastemaker party at their home to promote Absolut Krusty, Krusty the Clown's own brand of liquor. Mr. Burns takes notice of the party's success and decides to promote Homer to 'Account Man' for the Springfield Nuclear Plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ten-Per-Cent Solution
programme.desc: Krusty the Clown gets stuck in a rut when the television network pulls his show and his talent agency drops him. When the Simpsons introduce him to an agent, they're surprised to learn she was Krusty's first-ever agent.

programme.title: Family Guy: Short Cuts
programme.desc: When Brian accidentally becomes a local hero, an old street pal and now a successful millionaire dog reaches out and tries to convince him to get neutered. Meanwhile, Lois gets a pixie cut against Peter's wishes.

programme.title: Family Guy: Heart Burn
programme.desc: In celebration of Peter and Lois' anniversary, the Griffins recount their own versions of three well-known love stories.

programme.title: Archer: Legs
programme.desc: Archer's fear of cyborgs hits home when Krieger offers to make robotic legs for Gillette.

programme.title: Archer: Midnight Ron
programme.desc: The beginning of beautiful hatred between Archer and his new stepfather plays out as the two are chased by gangsters.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Miyagi returns to his homeland with Daniel to visit his dying father and confront old foes.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Deep Sea
programme.desc: From jellyfish with 40-meter long tentacles, fish with headlights, and vampire squid, the deep sea contains some of the most extraordinary and bizarre wildlife.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: The ocean and many of its inhabitants, such as the blue whale, remain a mystery.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: The Deep
programme.desc: Some of the weirdest life forms on earth live miles below the ocean surface. Meet a cast of fantastic creatures including the Fangtooth, with teeth so large it can't close its mouth.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Open Ocean
programme.desc: Examines the predatory skills of some of the most charismatic hunters found on the planet: whales, dolphins, tuna, shark and rapier-nosed billfish.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Frozen Seas
programme.desc: A look at the survival techniques of creatures that endure the harsh conditions of the Arctic and Antarctic.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Seasonal Seas
programme.desc: Explores seasonal changes in the richest waters on earth.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Coral Seas
programme.desc: The amazingly fragile ecosystems of the world's coral reefs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Color Purr-Pol
programme.desc: When Charles hears of a new technological breakthrough, he decides it’s time to give his partially colorblind father the greatest gift of all: the gift of color.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dairy Queens
programme.desc: Not even snow and ice can stop the staff at Pol Veterinary Services from doing their jobs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mommy Reindeerest
programme.desc: Early springtime in Michigan means mothers, including Diane Pol, are being celebrated across the state.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol-lapse of Judgment
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his staff are used to busy days, and today is no different.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Russian Star Wars
programme.desc: Multiple dashcams capture a sinister orb in the night sky above Omsk, Russia, that shoots a bright beam of light towards Earth; experts use cutting-edge imaging analysis to determine if this may be evidence of a secret Russian space-weapons program.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: In a small Tennessee town, Jenelle Potter has few friends. When her attraction to one of them isn't mutual, she is ostracized and feels threatened. Then a shadowy figure guides her family into a dark plot with a twisted ending no one saw coming.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Shattered: The Bodies Out Back
programme.desc: 1986. A 13-year-old girl escapes her captors, then lives in fear they'll return to kill her. A young boy learns his father's fate and realizes his nightmares are memories, and a prison break leads a rookie cop on the hunt for two ruthless murderers.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Life and Death of Amie Harwick
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a Hollywood therapist and whether the system did enough to protect her from alleged killer Gareth Pursehouse.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When clues at Jennifer Dulos's New Canaan, Connecticut home prompt police to search for the missing mother, her estranged husband's behaviour deepens the mystery. A complex web of evidence secures arrests, but what happens next shocks the nation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Life and Death of Amie Harwick
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a Hollywood therapist and whether the system did enough to protect her from alleged killer Gareth Pursehouse.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When clues at Jennifer Dulos's New Canaan, Connecticut home prompt police to search for the missing mother, her estranged husband's behaviour deepens the mystery. A complex web of evidence secures arrests, but what happens next shocks the nation.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: A Woman's Place
programme.desc: On one terrible morning, ten year old Leona O'Loughlin doesn't show up for school while her detective father, Leo, falls violently ill.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Don't Scream
programme.desc: A young mom calls 911 claiming she cut her own throat in front of her ex-husband and child. Doctors say there’s no way she did it to herself.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: The Sins of the Father
programme.desc: When Netta McKoy moves in with her boyfriend Peter Moses Jr., she finds out he is a polygamist cult leader trying to populate a nation of Black Hebrew Israelites.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Mafia Murder
programme.desc: Sergei Kobozev, an up-and-coming Russian boxer, immigrates to Brooklyn, NY in the early 90's with dreams of becoming a world champion. He soon proves he has the talent and determination, so when he goes missing, it's a total shock to the boxing world.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Death Wish
programme.desc: A park ranger in Texas pulls over a suspicious truck filled with marijuana. The passenger flees deep into the desert, unleashing a manhunt that will unearth something far more sinister--and bizarre--than detectives could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Daddy's Got A Gun
programme.desc: A decorated police officer and single father relies on his kind and generous neighbors to help care for his beloved daughter. When she accuses one of them of molesting her, anger boils over, all hell breaks loose... and blood flows in the streets.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love Sick
programme.desc: In 2014, police are called to a lifeless body in a trailer in Winona, Missouri. The owners, Jason and Stephanie McClurg, have suffered a series of misfortunes which have put their marriage under enormous pressure. But nobody expected it to lead to murder.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Murder Calling
programme.desc: When firefighters are called to a blazing truck, what they find in the house pales in comparison the bullet-ridden bodies of Robert and Dorothy Pape. And the heat turns up when police realize the extinguished truck belongs to someone else.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World

programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Home Sweet Loan
programme.desc: Mike has convinced Kristin and Ryan to buy a home instead of renting an apartment. But when he finds the ideal place for them, Ryan surprises everyone with a change of heart and backs out of the idea.

programme.title: Mom: Flying Monkeys and a Tank of Nitrous
programme.desc: When Marjorie’s husband passes away, the ladies accompany her on a trip to memorialize him.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Leading Me On-line/ Bent Out Finances
programme.desc: A couple argue over the meaning of a date; a dispute over an unpaid Pilates bill.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Two Wrongs Don't Make a Right/ And Then There Were Three
programme.desc: Dad sues over son's college tuition; performer sues for breach of contract.

programme.title: Protection Court: Baby Daddy and Ex/ Training His Ex Wife
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Locked Up Without My Stuff/ Put Away Your Pallet
programme.desc: A woman sues her landlord for the value of her belongings; man sues after wrongful firing.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Whittaker vs. Schrull
programme.desc: A young woman from Alabama claims her friend is the father of her 2-year-old baby. However, he and his meddling mother say it's not possible.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Perry vs. Davis
programme.desc: An overwhelmed single mother from NC wants to know if her facebook friend is the father of her two sons.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lebertha is suing Roberta for a personal loan, but Roberta hasn't been able to pay it back as she hasn't received her settlement money yet.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff dated the defendant and claims he filed a restraining order against her after she vandalized his car and sprayed him with mace.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Stealing From an Ex' and 'Playing Dirty.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Losing it on His Sister.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Hoarding Roommate/ 4th and Goal
programme.desc: Roommates dispute over a laptop that was thrown away/ a man loses out on a job and blames his barber.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Terrance is suing James for failing to properly fix his car, btu James says he provided services and fixed the car on the budget he was ordered to follow. Then, Jessica says her neighbour's daughter egged her car, damaging the hood.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 'I Feel Like This Is My Last Hope'
programme.desc: Brittney says that her daughter told her that her ex-husband, Chancellor, raped her. If that wasn’t bad enough, Brittney was told by her son that Chancellor’s girlfriend, Angie, physically abused him.

programme.title: Maury: Four Babies ... Four Men Tested ... Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Charlese and her sister are left raising her baby after the father denies that it is his, the DNA test will bring an end to the accusations. Then, Destiny is here to learn if the father she knew who died when she was eight was really her father.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Dude, Try a Transsexual
programme.desc: Steph’on is going to meet a woman named Elexandria who he’s been messaging on-line. He’s no stranger to meeting women this way and hopes Elexandria is everything her picture says she is.

programme.title: Longhorn Film Showcase
programme.desc: Short student films from the Department of Radio, Television and Film are featured. From insightful narratives and documentaries to cutting-edge pieces, these films represent just a sampling of the award-winning work done by UT's film students.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Vince Takes a Bath
programme.desc: When Vince throws out his back, Joyce conveniently disappears, leaving Mike and Molly to care for him. Meanwhile, the newlyweds struggle to write personalized thank-you notes for their wedding presents.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Flower Power
programme.desc: Doug tries to prove that he is romantic when Carrie is jealous of a co-worker's flowers.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Disappointing Unit
programme.desc: Max and Caroline are tasked with retrieving Sophie's wedding dress from customs and safely transporting it to the church in time for her big wedding.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sheryl Underwood, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Russell Peters.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bow's sister comes to town after filming a stint on a reality show, and they couldn't have less in common. Meanwhile, Zoey suggests that Dre spend more time with Junior since she’s leaving for college, and Jack and Diane decide to rebrand themselves.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Nyima Funk 1
programme.desc: Guest comedian is Nyima Funk.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Jonathan Mangum 8
programme.desc: Guest comedian Jonathan Mangum puts his skills to the test.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us
programme.desc: Aspiring magicians are invited to perform their best tricks to try and fool Penn & Teller. Anyone who succeeds wins the rights to perform with the duo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Elaine, Jerry and George travel to India to attend the wedding of Elaine's bra-less friend. Elaine discovers she has slept with the groom and George learns that Jerry slept with his girlfriend, Nina. Meanwhile, Kramer tries to protect himself from a wish.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Puffy Shirt
programme.desc: Kramer's girlfriend coerces Jerry into wearing a puffy shirt on a television appearance.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Kinda Like Necrophilia
programme.desc: Alan seeks revenge when he discovers that Charlie stole his high school girlfriend.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The 9:04 From Pemberton
programme.desc: Following a fight with Walden, Alan moves in with Herb.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Adam is very excited for his laser tag birthday party since he plans to invite Dana for the first time. But Barry thinks the theme is childish and agrees to help Adam organize a secret makeout party in the basement.

programme.title: Mom: Cinderella and a Drunk MacGyver
programme.desc: Christy tries to help Julian, a handsome, newly sober AA member but her attraction to him complicates things. Meanwhile, Bonnie jumps at the chance to attend a lavish charity gala with Jill.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Eve's Band
programme.desc: Eve and her friend Cammy form a new band, they sound so horrible that Mike comes up with an idea to break them up, but his plan has unexpected results. Meanwhile, Kyle and Mandy babysit Boyd.

programme.title: Mom: Cottage Cheese and a Weird Buzz

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Thanksgiving

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Vanessa Fixes Kyle
programme.desc: Since Vanessa is feeling guilty after encouraging Mandy to break up with the sometimes clueless Kyle, she is determined to mend things, but her sincere efforts only seem to make a bad situation worse.

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up
programme.desc: When Zoey gets into several colleges around the country, Dre and Bow begin to feel worried and sentimental. They reflect back on memories they've had with the family and wonder what life will be like without her around all the time.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.
